task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI showing '/home/ga/Volumes/onboarding_template.hc' in one of the mounted slots, or a terminal window showing a successful 'veracrypt' mount command for this path.

task_completion.description: Create a new VeraCrypt volume at the specified target path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard showing the volume location set to '/home/ga/Volumes/Issued/jdoe_chimera.hc', or a terminal command initiating volume creation at this path.

task_completion.description: Configure the new volume with Serpent encryption, SHA-512, 20 MB size, and FAT filesystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt wizard screens showing 'Serpent' selected as the Encryption Algorithm, 'SHA-512' as the Hash Algorithm, '20 MB' in the Volume Size screen, and 'FAT' in the Volume Format screen (or equivalent CLI flags).

task_completion.description: Mount the newly created target volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI showing 'jdoe_chimera.hc' successfully mounted in an available slot, or a terminal window showing a successful mount command for the new volume.

task_completion.description: Copy all files from the template volume to the new volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal window showing the files 'Project_Chimera_Protocol.pdf', 'Emergency_Contact_List.csv', and 'Q3_Financial_Forecast.xlsx' present inside the mounted directory of the new 'jdoe_chimera.hc' volume.

task_completion.description: Dismount both the template and target volumes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI showing no volumes mounted (empty slots), or a terminal window showing a successful dismount command (e.g., 'veracrypt -d') executed at the end of the task.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used VeraCrypt to create and mount the volumes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the VeraCrypt GUI or valid 'veracrypt' CLI commands being executed. The agent should not simply use 'touch' or 'dd' to create a fake '.hc' file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent copied the actual files rather than creating empty dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a file manager copy/paste operation or a terminal 'cp' command transferring files from the template mount point to the target mount point.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the encryption by removing passwords or using unencrypted archives.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt password prompts or CLI password flags should be visible, confirming the agent applied the required passwords ('TemplatePass123' and 'SerpentSecure2024!').
